name: clawdia
description: AI desktop workspace — browser, code, and task automation.
author: Daniel Parker

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 dist/main/main.js dist/main/preload.js && nodemon --watch dist/main --watch dist/shared --exec "cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron --no-sandbox ."
scripts.dev:nogpu: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron:nogpu"
scripts.dev:electron:nogpu: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 dist/main/main.js dist/main/preload.js && nodemon --watch dist/main --watch dist/shared --exec "cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-software-rasterizer --disable-gpu-sandbox --disable-dev-shader-cache --disable-accelerated-2d-canvas --use-gl=swiftshader ."
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
